S

Sensor - Class in ECTE331_Project
Simulates an altitude sensor for the autonomous drone.
Sensor(String) - Constructor for class ECTE331_Project.Sensor
Creates a sensor with the specified identifier.
SensorReadException - Exception in ECTE331_Project
Exception thrown when a sensor fails to produce a valid altitude reading.
SensorReadException(String) - Constructor for exception ECTE331_Project.SensorReadException
Creates a new SensorReadException.
SystemReliabilityException - Exception in ECTE331_Project
Exception thrown when the drone system enters SAFE MODE due to consecutive reliability failures.
SystemReliabilityException(String) - Constructor for exception ECTE331_Project.SystemReliabilityException
Creates a new SystemReliabilityException.
